jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Meesho
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Meesho. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Meesho:
Meesho is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho!
